name: achillea millefolium
title: best benefits of achillea millefolium
description: Achillea millefolium lowers blood pressure by reducing the force of blood against artery walls, which can help prevent cardiovascular disease. This benefit is crucial because high blood pressure can lead to heart attacks, strokes, and kidney disease, which are among the leading causes of death worldwide.
